buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1E1E1E] rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center border border-[#27272A]
buttons.outline: border border-[#D4AF37] rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center

inputs.container: bg-[#141414] rounded-xl border border-[#27272A] px-4 py-3

cards.service_card: bg-[#141414] rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#27272A] flex-row items-center
cards.professional_card: bg-[#141414] rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#27272A] items-center text-center

bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1 bg-[#52525B] rounded-full mt-3 mb-5 self-center

animations.page_transition: Slide from right or bottom (React Navigation default for iOS)
animations.buttons: Opacity feedback (ActiveOpacity 0.7) or scale down slightly on press
animations.modals: Smooth slide up from bottom (Bottom Sheet behavior)
animations.splash: Fade in logo, hold for 2s, scale up and fade out to Onboarding

splash_logo_bg.description: Dark aesthetic salon interior for splash screen background overlay.

home_featured_banner.description: Luxury hair salon interior for home banner.

stylist_1.description: Professional hairdresser in a modern salon.

stylist_2.description: Woman sitting on a chair, stylist portrait.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a REACT NATIVE EXPO app. DO NOT use standard DOM elements like <div>, <span>, <button>, or HTML Shadcn components.
For styling, you can use NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) if configured, or React Native StyleSheet mapped to the provided hex colors.
For icons, use `lucide-react-native` with white or gold (#D4AF37) colors depending on active state.
Dark Mode is the PRIMARY and default theme. The background must be #0A0A0A.
Use 'react-native-calendars' for the booking date selection, matching the dark/gold theme.
All interactive elements MUST include `testID` property (equivalent to `data-testid` in web) for testing, e.g., `testID="login-submit-button"`.
Component Corners: Ensure prominent use of rounded-xl (16px) or rounded-2xl (24px) for cards, and rounded-full for primary buttons.
Navigation: Assume standard React Navigation stack/tabs. Bottom tab bar should be dark (#141414) with Gold active icon colors.
